laws.title: Alt Text on Images
laws.description: Ensure all images have descriptive alt text for screen readers.
laws.remediation: Audit the HTML content to include alt attributes for all images.

laws.title: Keyboard Navigation
laws.description: Ensure all interactive elements are accessible via keyboard.
laws.remediation: Verify tab order and add focus states to all interactive components.

laws.title: Accessible Forms
laws.description: Ensure all form fields are properly labeled and accessible.
laws.remediation: Associate labels with inputs using 'for' attribute and ensure proper fieldset/legend use.

laws.title: Contrast Ratios
laws.description: Maintain sufficient contrast between text and background colors for readability.
laws.remediation: Use tools to test and adjust contrast ratios to meet WCAG 2.1 standards.

laws.title: ARIA Landmarks
laws.description: Employ ARIA roles to enhance the accessibility of dynamic content.
laws.remediation: Integrate ARIA roles and properties to assistive technologies in navigating web content.
